3247980.name: Flint
3247980.description:
Flint is an adventure style game that tasks you, the "Stone-Born," with defeating the tyrannical Übel as he holds complete control over the world. Discover a brand new world full of fascinating characters, terrifying foes and tactical weapons to use. 

This is a top-down game in which you wake up in a post apocalyptic world and have to discover your place in it while wrestling with powerful monsters every step of the way. 

Using the Hot-Cycle, you can switch between three different tools at a time, allowing for fluid, strategic combat. You'll have to think on your feet during combat, staying still means death. Dodging is a necessity, enabling quick movement on the battlefield to keep you alive. Parrying allows you to negate enemy damage if timed correctly. Fight like you mean it and use the right tools for the job during combat or you could find yourself at a fatal disadvantage against Mechanoids or Tanks.

You can also upgrade your weapons using Platinum Crystals found throughout the world, allowing access to specialized Runes that give each weapon an extra kick, a halberd can be turned into a Crowd Controlling death machine, or a spear can be turned into a fierce projectile launcher.

Looting parts from defeated enemies, you can go to NPCs in Siedlung and craft specialized equipment, like the Battle-breaker and Plasmoid Armor sets to optimize yourself for either speed, or full protection. 

Test your reflexes by fighting twitchy bosses like Rafael, the Crestfallen. Bosses appear at the end of every dungeon and will require your full attention and an understanding of the game to progress. From the mighty beast Halifax, who's a terrifying grappler, to even an epic Hydra with Flame, Shock and Wind projectiles. You're in for the fight of your life here to save the world, it's Dare or Die.

Traverse through mysterious dungeons like the Asylum, which houses puzzles and secrets to keep you on the edge of your seat as you progress step by step, turning on switches, finding keys, using terminal computers and even moving boxes around.

With multiple difficulties, including "Stone Born" and "Dare or Die," modifiers called Shards, that change the gameplay around significantly. Test your limits and see your score to measure how well you did.

Experience the epic story which will have you uncovering secrets, testing your morality, as you travel upwards towards the Golden Oath, Take part in being a Knight that fights for ultimate global peace and find out if you're truly on the right side of history as you stand on the side of Hamarolf.
3247980.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
